rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Explorer Spawning CMD With Start/Exit Commands (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Explorer Spawning CMD With Start/Exit Commands (RedCanary Threat Detection
  Report)
id: c4e301d9-9f2d-4a81-9c98-60596edb55a3
status: experimental
description: "Detects instances of explorer.exe spawning cmd.exe along with corresponding\
  \ start and \nexit commands that we commonly observe in conjunction with a wide\
  \ variety of malicious \nactivity. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-command-shell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.003
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \explorer.exe
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - start
    - exit
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
